overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district. The player moves along city streets past towering buildings covered in digital billboards, with flying vehicles visible overhead between skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: waiting at red traffic light as vehicles pass through the intersection
beginning to cross the street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk next to metal railings, approaching a crosswalk with neon billboards visible on surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: green metal safety railing running along the sidewalk edge
large digital billboard displaying ChroManticore advertisement with bright blue background
vertical traffic signal pole showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked downtown street at night, with the camera walking forward along a sidewalk bordered by metal railings. Large digital billboards including a prominent ChroManticore advertisement illuminate the right side of the street. The player approaches a traffic light, waits for vehicles to pass, then begins crossing the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with multi-lane traffic and flying vehicles

events.description: black sports car drives past from right to left in front of the camera
flying vehicle passes overhead between the tall buildings

agents.ego_description: moving through the crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left
blue van driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large white digital billboard with pink nCola logo and branding
digital advertisement displaying chrome cybernetic imagery

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the intersection crosswalk, passing a black sports car and navigating around pedestrians. The nCola and Chrome billboards dominate the left side of the view as flying vehicles traverse the sky between buildings. The environment remains open with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon beneath elevated highway and train tracks

events.description: entering narrower street section beneath overhead highway structure
camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under overhanging structures, occasionally looking up at the towering architecture and flying traffic above

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: elevated multi-lane highway structure spanning between buildings with vehicles traveling above
red digital billboard displaying COMBAT CAB text and graphics
massive dark skyscrapers with illuminated windows reaching into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower urban canyon with an overhead highway structure dominating the upper portion of the frame. The camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles navigating between them. A Combat Cab billboard is visible on the right as the player continues walking under the elevated infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked downtown district that shifts from an open, neon-lit intersection into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins with a walk along a sidewalk bordered by metal railings, where the glow of a ChroManticore advertisement illuminates the wet pavement as the camera approaches and crosses a busy intersection. As the camera navigates through the crosswalk past pedestrians and a black sports car, the view opens up to reveal nCola and Chrome billboards and flying vehicles traversing the sky. The scene then shifts into a narrower corridor dominated by a massive overhead highway structure, with the camera tilting upward to capture towering skyscrapers and flying traffic. Finally, the movement continues under the heavy elevated infrastructure, passing a Combat Cab billboard as the city walls close in.
